summary: Steps for employees/admins/owners to log in securely before using any module.
key_points: From the landing page select your role (Employee, Bakery Owner, Admin) if prompted; enter username/password issued by Admin.
If Remember me is checked the session token is stored locally until you log out.
After login the sidebar shows modules allowed for your role: employees see inventory/tasks, owners see dashboards/alerts, admins see management tools.
Use the Log out button in the sidebar bottom whenever you switch role or share the kiosk.

summary: Hai bước nhập nguyên liệu thủ công trong IMDS.
key_points: Bước 1: ở trang `Nhập nguyên liệu`, điền đầy đủ thông tin từng dòng; có thể bấm `Thêm dòng mới` để tạo thêm dòng nhập. Sau khi kiểm tra, bấm `Lưu nguyên liệu` để chuyển sang bước kế tiếp.

Bước 2: tại trang `Lưu nguyên liệu`, bấm `Thêm nguyên liệu` để quay lại chỉnh sửa danh sách, bấm `Xuất` nếu cần tải file Excel tổng hợp, và bấm `Hoàn tất nhập kho` để chính thức ghi nhận các lô vào kho.
In the same Import screen switch to `Scan mode`.
Use the connected scanner or device camera to capture the QR/Barcode printed on the supplier slip.
System auto-populates lot code, ingredient, and expiry if the code matches a template; user only confirms quantity and storage info.
Save to commit; any fields not parsed can still be typed manually.

source: Inventory module – PB05, PB07, PB09, PB11
summary: Ensuring ingredients are consumed in FIFO order and marking what was used.
key_points: Open `Check inventory` → select ingredient; lots are sorted by oldest expiry (FIFO). Always pick the first `Valid` lot unless it is flagged `Opened/Use Today`.
During production, go to `Usage` tab and record the quantity taken from each lot; the system subtracts from on-hand and recalculates expiry for opened bags.
If a bag is opened but not fully used, tick `Opened package` so the system tracks the new shelf life and prompts reuse or disposal.
Spoiled or discarded quantities should be logged under `Waste reports` with a reason to keep dashboards accurate.

source: Owner/Admin dashboard – PB13, PB14, PB16, PB18
summary: Using the alert panel and reports to plan actions.
key_points: Header bell icon shows count of urgent alerts (expired or <3 days) plus early warnings (low stock / 4-7 days). Click to open the detailed list.
Owners/Admins rely on `Today’s alerts` widget and `Recent activity` panel to know which lots were imported/consumed.
Reports module provides daily/weekly/monthly summaries: usage vs. waste, cost of goods, demand forecast, recommended replenishment.
Schedule: review alerts twice per shift, run replenishment report end-of-day, export CSV/PDF if you need offline handover.
